study.journal: The New England Journal of Medicine. 2000;342(18):1301-1308.

clinical_question.condition: Acute Lung Injury / Acute Respiratory Distress Syndrome

population_context.population_description: Patients with acute lung injury or ARDS on mechanical ventilation. PaO2:FiO2 < 300 with bilateral infiltrates.

intervention.name: Low tidal volume ventilation
components: Tidal volume 6 ml/kg predicted body weight
intervention.parameter_values: Vt 6 ml/kg PBW, plateau pressure ≤30 cmH2O

comparator.description: Traditional tidal volume ventilation 12 ml/kg PBW, plateau pressure ≤50 cmH2O

outcome_effect.outcome_name: Death before discharge home or before 28 days
